task_completion.visual_evidence: The Apache OpenOffice Writer application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Company logo is inserted into the document
task_completion.visual_evidence: An image representing the Apex Structural Engineering logo is visible within the OpenOffice Writer document.

task_completion.description: Form title and company name are typed in the document
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'New Hire Data Sheet' and 'Apex Structural Engineering' are visible in the document.

task_completion.description: Interactive text box form controls are added
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for interactive text box form controls (typically appearing as gray shaded rectangles or distinct form fields) placed next to labels like Name, Address, or Email.

task_completion.description: Interactive date field form controls are added
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for date field form controls (often appearing as shaded boxes with a small dropdown arrow on the right side) placed next to labels like 'Start Date'.

task_completion.description: Interactive checkbox form controls are added
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for interactive checkbox form controls (small square boxes with a 3D or shaded appearance, distinct from regular typed text) in the Compliance Checklist section.

task_completion.description: The document is saved with the correct filename
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenOffice Writer title bar or a 'Save As' dialog box displays the filename 'Apex_New_Hire_Form.odt'.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenOffice Writer GUI to create the document
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the OpenOffice Writer menus, canvas, and toolbars, rather than generating the .odt file entirely via a terminal script.

integrity.description: The agent used actual form controls rather than faking them with text
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Form Controls' toolbar being open or interacted with. The checkboxes and text fields must be actual UI elements, not just typed characters like '[ ]' or '_______'.

integrity.description: The agent saved the file through the application
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Save' or 'Save As' dialog box in OpenOffice, confirming the file was saved manually through the UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The form must be created in Apache OpenOffice Writer and saved as 'Apex_New_Hire_Form.odt'. It must include the company name 'Apex Structural Engineering', the title 'New Hire Data Sheet', and the logo from 'apex_logo.png'. The form requires actual interactive form controls (not plain text), specifically at least 5 text fields, 1 date field, and 3 checkboxes. The sections should include 'Employee Information', 'Employment Details', and 'Compliance Checklist'.
